A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

What is this on their japa bags?

Other · asked by user [] · 2010-11-07 · 2 answers
Hare Krishna.[br][br]

I have seen this photo and I am curious what Srila Prabhupada and another devotee have attached to their japa bags:[br]

[img]http://sdgonline.org/viraha/p/CT10-184.jpg[/img]
[br]
It looks like a kind of brooch with an image on it, or perhaps an old-fashioned watch.[br][br]

Thank you for your replies.
user [166] · 2010-11-07
I believe its a badge with Bhaktisiddhanta Swamis photo....I assume Tripuraris bead bag has Srila Prabhupadas picture on his.
user [248] · 2010-11-09
yes a large button with their Guru Maharajas photo
